title: Multi-Module joint Optimization Algorithm for RAG

defines.name: MMOA-RAG
defines.definition: A multi-agent reinforcement learning framework that models each module in a RAG pipeline as an agent and jointly optimizes them toward a shared final-answer reward.

problem: Standard independently trained RAG modules are misaligned with the end goal of producing accurate final answers, and existing end-to-end methods do not adequately handle multi-component pipeline interdependencies.
